title: ProDec 8" Vinyl Smoother for Smoothing Vinyl Wallpapers, Taping and Jointing
features: 8" (200mm) vinyl smoother for pressing and smoothing vinyl wall coverings
Flexible blue sprung steel blade helps position papers, smooth into place and remove air bubbles for optimum adhesion
Ideal as a straight edge to help with cutting papers at the top or bottom of a drop
Also suitable for jointing and taping walls (not suitable as a plastering tool)
Ergonomic angled plastic handle with textured grip
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Paper your walls like a pro Vinyl smoothers help to press wallpaper onto the surface and ease it into place, smoothing papers out to eliminate creases. Suitable for most wallcoverings and at its best with thicker or heavier wallpapers with robust surfaces, the flexible blue sprung steel blade is hard enough to eliminate bubbling for the optimum adhesion to the wall and flexible enough not to tear the paper. It's also useful as a straight edge for cutting papers with a sharp knife, giving an accurate, true cut at the top against ceilings, coving, etc. and the bottom against skirting board, dado rails, etc. The smoother can also be used for patching holes, taping and jointing drywall, but note that it is not suitable for smoothing freshly applied plaster. Handy hints : to ensure you don't damage the wallcovering, try using at a shallow angle and never apply more pressure than absolutely necessary. May not be suitable for very delicate papers or those with a hand-decorated pattern. Wallpapering solutions from ProDec From cutting to pasting, application to smoothing, ProDec has a range of tools to help you get the best results when papering. Paste tables Lightweight yet sturdy, featuring a robust MDF board laminated with a melamine top that is waterproof, scratch resistant and easily wiped clean of paste and other liquids. Straight legs so the table won't buck when weight is put on it, with foldaway design plus integral carrying handle. Papering brushes Carefully selected for the optimum blend of flexibility and softness to smooth papers down and chase out air bubbles, our papering brushes are suitable even for delicate and stencilled papers. Professional paste brush A 6" extra wide, extra long head made from a blend of high durability synthetic and pure bristle, giving it a high paste holding capacity and smooth delivery, maximising the amount applied with each stroke. Wallpaper shears Made from heavy duty, rust-resistant Japanese stainless steel that is precision ground to be ultra-sharp. Gives a clean cut right to the end of the blade with all types of wallpaper, including thin and wet papers. Vinyl smoothers A professional quality flexible blue sprung steel blade available in a range of sizes that is hard enough to eliminate bubbling for the optimum adhesion to the wall and flexible enough not to tear the paper. Seam rollers An inexpensive way to ensure that wallpapering isn't spoiled by seams and edges that don't stay down, our seam rollers ensure the joins marry up without damaging the paper. Sponges ProDec has both natural cellulose sponges, which hold up to 20 times their own weight in water, and synthetic foam sponges to wipe away excess paste and help smooth papers down. Scrapers & filling knives A range of scrapers from light to heavy duty for removing existing papers, and filling knives for holes and cracks to give a super smooth surface for papering onto.
